_documentation.description: D'Ascola Seafood fleet vessel data. Edit this file to add, remove, or update vessels.

fields.name: Display name of the vessel.
fields.mmsi: Maritime Mobile Service Identity number (for AIS tracking). Set to null if not tracked via AIS.
fields.lat: Current latitude in decimal degrees. Negative = south of equator.
fields.lon: Current longitude in decimal degrees. Negative = west of prime meridian.
fields.heading: Heading in degrees. 0 = north, 90 = east, 180 = south, 270 = west.
fields.catch: Current or last catch species. Use '—' (em dash) if none.

portFields.name: Display name of the port.
portFields.size: Port size: 'major' (home port, larger icon) or 'minor' (smaller icon).

routeFields.name: Display name of the shipping route.
routeFields.points: Array of [lat, lon] waypoints defining the route path.

howToUpdate: 1. To ADD a vessel: copy an existing vessel object and modify the values.
2. To REMOVE a vessel: delete the vessel object from the 'vessels' array.
3. To CHANGE position: update lat, lon, heading, and speed values.
4. To CHANGE status: set status to one of: 'Fishing', 'In Transit', 'In Port', 'Returning'.
5. After editing, save this file and refresh the page (or call map.updateVessels()).
6. For live AIS tracking, set the mmsi field and configure aisEndpoint in the map config.
